RemoteRead.remoteReadUrl: The public URL prefix for the monitoring instance's Remote Read.
RemoteRead.query: The metric expression to query. Supports plain metric names or PromQL expressions with label selectors. When using GET, include this parameter in the URL query string.
RemoteRead.step: Query data step size in seconds. Required only for `/query_range` requests; can be included in the URL query string when using GET.
RemoteRead.start: Query start timestamp in seconds. Required only for `/query_range` requests; can be included in the URL query string when using GET.
RemoteRead.end: Query end timestamp in seconds. Required only for `/query_range` requests; can be included in the URL query string when using GET.
